introSection: Altair (previously known as Altair CCW-0204) is a steel roller coaster located at Cinecittà World in Rome, Lazio, Italy. It is one of the first 10-Inversion roller coasters built by Intamin to feature a redesigned track layout, lap bar-only trains, and a cable lift hill.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: The ride layout looks exactly like Colossus at Thorpe Park except for the cable lift and lack of a pre-drop. Also, some of the stats are slightly modified compared to Colossus'.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: Riders are held in by lap-bar restraints.

fullText:
Altair (previously known as Altair CCW-0204) is a steel roller coaster located at Cinecittà World in Rome, Lazio, Italy. It is one of the first 10-Inversion roller coasters built by Intamin to feature a redesigned track layout, lap bar-only trains, and a cable lift hill.



The ride layout looks exactly like Colossus at Thorpe Park except for the cable lift and lack of a pre-drop. Also, some of the stats are slightly modified compared to Colossus'.

Riders are held in by lap-bar restraints.
